title: RDO [Retro Decorations Overhauled]
description: adds retro-styled blocks (mosaic tiles, concrete blocks and other) and also a lot of windows
body:
RETRO DECORATIONS OVERHAULED

A complete remake of my previous project, Retro Decorations. This mod has the same theme - blocks inspired by 70s-90s easten bloc mosaic, streetlights, windows and more.

This mod is in early stage of development. It is not survival-friendly (yet). 

Any suggestions, feedback or questions are welcome [Discord](https://discord.gg/Jc4uNM3Pbq)

 

Content

Windows:
- metal: White and grey
- plastic: white and diagonal for window bays. a lot of them is in the mod
- wooden 2x2 window

 

Tiles:

- small medium and large tiles

 

Metal:

- metal stripped blocks

- metal pillar

- dark steel block (also slab and stairs)

- lamp pole

- lamp pole base

 

Luminiscent/light blocks:

- Lamp head 1

- Lamp head 2

- White luminiscent block 

 

Other: 

- Dark steel wall

- Dark steel trapdoor

- heatpump

- seven types of train platforms (mostly used in former Czechoslovakia) also including inclined and low variant

- turbine fan (used in tunnels, mines, etc...)
- Light tube, labeled as "Litube" in the mod (experimental, might get removed in later versions)

- Wooden floor

- Wooden parquette floor
